---
name: New slop pattern
about: Report an AI design pattern pixelslop should catch
title: "feat: detect "
labels: slop-pattern
---

## What does the pattern look like?

Describe the visual pattern. Screenshots help.

## Where have you seen it?

Which AI tools produce this? (Cursor, v0, Claude Artifacts, Bolt, etc.)

## How would you detect it?

What CSS properties, computed values, or DOM structures identify this pattern? The more specific, the better — pixelslop measures in the browser, so detection needs to be something Playwright can check.

## Suggested severity

- [ ] TERMINAL — breaks usability
- [ ] SLOPPY — clearly generic
- [ ] MILD — subtle but detectable
